6 C 6 1111111111 a mismatch

6 I 7 1100100010 4 mismatch

4 1100101010 5
5 1001110000 4
6 0101001000 3
Starting at I 4 increasing
I 5 1101011001 partial 1110001100 5
I 6 1000111100 partial 1110110011 7
I 7 1100100010 partial 0110010101 5
left 17
Starting at I 3 decreasing
I 2 1001101010 partial 0011011101 6
I 1 0001001100 partial 0111000011 5
I 0 0001110011 partial 0010100110 4
right 15
Choosing left
4 I 5
5 I 6
6 I 7

Selected
0 I 1
1 I 2
2 I 3
3 I 4
4 XOR 50
5 XOR 61
6 XOR 72
7 I 3

Applying to 00110001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 1 = 0
1 I 2 = 1
2 I 3 = 1
3 I 4 = 0
4 XOR 50 = XOR(I 5,I 0) = XOR(0,0) = 0
5 XOR 61 = XOR(I 6,I 1) = XOR(0,0) = 0
6 XOR 72 = XOR(I 7,I 2) = XOR(1,1) = 0
7 I 3 = 1

\boxed{01100001}
